gist.headline: Watering the apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking the health and metrics of all the amazing apps in our community greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) watering a garden of pixelated code-plants, representing the automated bot checking on the community apps. Polly the bee is hovering nearby with a tiny clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a digital garden where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a digital garden where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
